serviceDescription: The AWS Professional Services team provides assistance through a collection of offerings that help you achieve specific outcomes related to enterprise cloud adoption. We also deliver focused guidance through our global specialty practices, which cover a variety of solutions, technologies, and industries.

serviceSelector.title: Select applicable service years
serviceSelector.description: Select the years of the AWS Professional Services (“ProServe”) you want to estimate. This calculator is for informational purposes only. The AWS Professional Services are consulting and advisory services that are delivered on a Firm Fixed Price (“FFP”) per-unit basis pursuant to AWS’s contract. Each “Unit” consists of a minimum of 40 hours of ProServe. The FFP Unit estimates represent level of effort ceilings that AWS will work against. AWS must have a fully executed task order with the government customer prior to delivering any Units. AWS’s Unit pricing escalates each contract year, as provided in the contract.
